Ntc Of Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition And For Production Of Docs; Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiffs Margaret Colfer and Rudy Servin's motion to compel attendance and production of documents at deposition is ordered off calendar unless plaintiff submits a valid proof of personal service. A hearsay proof of personal service is not competent evidence that the motion was served. The proof of personal service must be signed by the person who actually served the motion. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
